title: Codeberg-first conversion surface repair
summary: Patched two high-intent Ralph Site docs surfaces so they now send evaluators to the primary Codeberg repo before the GitHub mirror, then added regression coverage for both source and generated pages.
why_now: marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json identified conversion_to_free_use as the current bottleneck
the latest audit explicitly required Codeberg-first public-facing links while GitHub mirror effort stays secondary
the execution board had no truthful do-now outbound packet in the current review window, so a live conversion-surface repair was the highest-leverage executable move
expected_outcome: Reduce mirror-first leakage on high-intent docs pages and keep future edits from reintroducing GitHub-first or GitHub-only conversion CTAs.
replacement_condition: If Codeberg adoption is still flat after the current review windows mature, move to a fresh executable lane rather than another docs-only repair.
